what_it_does: Documents a slot/socket contract for the V organism/brand-icon corner-handle, specifying how its render state, handler sockets, and child-connection sockets are authored as data, and how a six-verb face set (navigate, ask, annotate, drive, open-source, generate) binds to existing circuit primitives without new code.
observations: It is a living guide sourced from item-0af8d61e and authored by session ch-2mnxl9j0.
It defines the V asset as component.organism.brand-icon (V_ROW) rendered by definition-renderer.js.
The V state machine is linked to chat.processingState with six states: idle, launching, thinking, tool-use, error, success.
A socket is described as data with accepts, default, trigger, strategy, and optional connection fields.
Handler/verb sockets accept action_id types; child organisms plug in via connection sockets with choreography and collapse animations.
setSocket is described as a structuredClone/set/re-render data edit, not a code change.
The six face-verbs are mapped to existing primitives: traverse, Ask Claude Code, mark, mode-cascade dials, point-AI-at-source, and an unbuilt generate wire.
Three coherence locks are listed to keep the explainer vocabulary, socket registry, and future additions aligned.
Corner-expand is acknowledged as not currently built; the plan reuses the V hub, emerge/collapse connection-mount, and a future DNA 90° corner shell.
standouts: All socket binding is specified as data edits, not code changes.
The six face-verbs are intentionally bound to already-built circuit primitives.
Three explicit coherence locks are offered to prevent vocabulary drift.
The file is explicit about what is built, what is data, and what remains unbuilt.
conventions: Follows the noticeboard guide format with id, address, type, state, title, links, and history fields.
Uses URI-style addresses such as palette://brand/vi#{{state}}, action.<id>, and component.organism.<x>.
References concrete architecture files (factory-mount.js, factory-ops.js, definition-renderer.js, connection-mount.js, palette.js).
Declares honest scope markers such as '~5% shadow' and 'leave room' for the sixth verb.
concerns: Heavy forward-references to code files whose contents are not shown in this file.
The '~5% shadow' claim is not substantiated here.
The sixth 'generate' verb is explicitly noted as unbuilt.
The registry-registered-child guard is asserted but the registry contract is not shown.
It mixes specification, implementation status, and coordination instructions in one document.
notes: A living guide that data-binds the V organism's socket contract to six face-verbs and coordinates the composition-to-DNA handoff for a corner-handle shell.
questions: Where is the actual V_ROW definition file located?
What is the exact schema and location of the socket registry?
How does setSocket reject illegal types or handle missing registry entries?
What does '~5% shadow' mean in measurable terms?
Which existing primitives implement ask, open-source, and generate?
What is the intended structure of the 90° corner-shell layout?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file presents itself as a guide for the V slot/socket contract and the six-verb socket set, and its content is exactly that specification plus provider handoff notes.
apparent_themes: honest scoping of built versus unbuilt work
mode-token handle and emergent UI choreography
intention_signals: Establish a single source of truth for the corner-handle's verbs so that composition and DNA can build the V and its expanding shell without re-listing functions or writing new code for each rebind.
novelty: Treats UI verbs as a socket-set authored as data on a reusable organism contract, with explicit coherence locks to prevent vocabulary drift between explainer and implementation.
contribution: A declarative socket contract mapping the V organism and six face-verbs to existing primitives, plus coherence locks and a clear provider boundary for composition/DNA integration.
summary_for_embedding: A living noticeboard guide that defines the V organism's slot/socket contract, binds six face-verbs (navigate, ask, annotate, drive, open-source, generate) as data sockets over existing primitives, and coordinates the composition-to-DNA handoff for a corner-handle UI shell.
intention_for_embedding: To make the corner-handle's verb set a single, data-driven socket registry that composition and DNA share without drift or new code per rebind.
